gist.headline: Daily README Refresh
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot gave the README its daily polish, updating the latest news and recent community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recent community applications.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's front page fresh and up-to-date with the latest community activity.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee and the monitor robot updating a giant digital bulletin board or reading a fresh newspaper in a garden setting.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot updating a giant digital bulletin board in a lush garden. The robot holds a fresh pixelated newspaper. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot updating a giant digital bulletin board in a lush garden. The robot holds a fresh pixelated newspaper. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
